name: Ui.Button

unions.name: ButtonColor
unions.comment:
Defines the available button colors

  - `Primary`: used to get users main focus
  - `Secondary`: used as an accent to `Primary`
  - `Warn`: used to indicate a destructive and/or dangerous action

unions.name: ButtonContent
unions.comment: Defins the content of the button

unions.name: ButtonEmphasis
unions.comment: Defines the emphasis of the button

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a button.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> { onClick : msg, color : Ui.Button.ButtonColor, emphasis : Ui.Button.ButtonEmphasis } -> Ui.Button.ButtonContent -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Returns a view of a button
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: { onClick : msg, color : Ui.Button.ButtonColor, emphasis : Ui.Button.ButtonEmphasis } -> Ui.Button.ButtonContent -> Html.Styled.Html msg

name: Ui.Icon

values.name: setFill
values.comment: Set a fill color for the given icon

values.name: view
values.comment: Creates a view for the given icon

name: Ui.Pagination

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a pagination component.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute Basics.Never) -> Ui.Pagination.Model -> { siblingCount : Basics.Int, boundaryCount : Basics.Int, onNav : Ui.Pagination.Model -> msg } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

values.name: getInitial
values.comment: Return the left range [1,current page - 1] of the current page

values.name: getTail
values.comment: Return the right range [current page + 1, number of pages] of the current page

values.name: init
values.comment: Creates a model for the component

values.name: view
values.comment:
Returns a view of a pagination component.
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: Ui.Pagination.Model -> { siblingCount : Basics.Int, boundaryCount : Basics.Int, onNav : Ui.Pagination.Model -> msg } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

name: Ui.RadioButton

values.name: customView
values.comment:
Returns a custom view of a radio button group.
Only use this when `view` is not enough.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute Basics.Never) -> { onChange : a -> msg, options : List.List { optionLabel : String.String, value : a, disabled : Basics.Bool }, label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe a, direction : Ui.RadioButton.Direction } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg

values.name: view
values.comment:
Return a view of a radio button group.
This should be used whenever possible.
You can use `customView` if you need to
customize the button.
values.type: { onChange : a -> msg, options : List.List { optionLabel : String.String, value : a, disabled : Basics.Bool }, label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe a, direction : Ui.RadioButton.Direction } -> Accessibility.Styled.Html msg
